name: API Layer
description: FastAPI routers under app/api/ that expose the shop's HTTP surface — auth, staff, shops, products, lots, checkout, voids, EOD dashboard and health — plus the shared error-handling and dependency-injection helpers (_errors.py, deps.py, _test_only.py) that back every endpoint.

name: Schemas (Types) Layer
description: Pydantic request/response models under app/schemas/ that define the wire contract for auth, shops, lots, products, checkout and EOD reconciliation between clients and the API layer.

name: Service Layer
description: Business-logic modules under app/services/ that implement checkout pricing, void/reversal workflow, end-of-day reconciliation, low-stock alerting and invoice PDF generation for the single-counter liquor shop.

name: Security & Middleware Layer
description: Cross-cutting authentication utilities — JWT issuance/verification and password hashing — used by the API layer's Depends() chain to authorize staff and owner actions.

name: Data Layer
description: SQLAlchemy 2.0 async ORM models (shops, users, products, lots, invoices, audit logs) together with the Alembic migration chain that evolves the Postgres schema from foundation tables through GST/excise invoicing.

name: Application Entry & Configuration
description: The FastAPI app factory, CLI entry point, DB engine/session setup, logging and pydantic-settings config, alongside project-level config files (pyproject.toml, alembic.ini, .env.example) and the docker-compose service definition that wires the app to Postgres for local/deployed runs.

name: Test Layer
description: Pytest suite (with shared conftest fixtures) covering auth/authorization, checkout, voids, EOD reconciliation, low-stock alerts, lots, products, shops, staff, audit log tables and health checks.

name: Documentation & Planning
description: Project README, onboarding guide, and the harness/ planning trail (intake, branch map, ledger, PRD, absences, issues) that records how Barstock's requirements were scoped and delivered feature by feature.
